# v64 — GoalOS Command Console

Adds a front-and-center, ChatGPT-style, browser-local command console for plain-language objectives.

- New public route: `goalos-command-console.html`
- New data contract: `data/goalos-command-console-demo.json`
- New schema: `schemas/goalos-command-console.schema.json`
- New test and kernel coverage
- Homepage now highlights the one-box command experience while preserving every existing page
- Canonical route count: 68 public routes

The release preserves the public-safe boundary: no account, no form submission, no wallet, no token approval, no analytics, no cookies, no browser storage, no network request from the console, no transaction broadcast, no production authority, and no user data retained.
